content: After opening a PR, run /greploop until Greptile scores 5/5 with zero unresolved comments, then squash-merge with commit title format '... (#N)'. main is unprotected — verify the build and 'npm test' pass before merging.

All commit messages and PR titles must follow Conventional Commits: type(scope): description, e.g. 'feat(mining): add tool tiers', 'fix: glass pane rendering'. Types: feat, fix, docs, chore, refactor, test, perf, ci, build, style. PR titles use the same format (semantic PRs); since PRs are squash-merged, the PR title becomes the commit title on main, formatted 'type(scope): description (#N)'.
